---
title: "Applications"
---

Application pages are active proof/benchmark target tracks for AI, compute, rendering, systems, and data analysis. Benchmark claims must stay separate from Lean proof status.

<div class="warning-box">
Application pages are active but exploratory unless a theorem card says otherwise. Benchmarks and fixtures are executable references, not proof of real-world performance or usefulness.
</div>

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="APPD-T0001"></div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
